payments.appg_name: All-Party Parliamentary Group on Explosive Weapons and their Impact
payments.summary: International visit to Ukraine between 05 October 2025 and 11 October 2025 — To raise the importance of humanitarian demining on the Ukrainian political agenda through dialogue and engagement with Ukrainian parliamentarians and officials.
payments.description: 20% of all: Flights & Train (£237.80), internal travel (£53.80), accommodation (£154.80), hospitality (£210.20), Tech Equipment (£106.60).
